actions.text: A woman has appeared in court charged with murdering her 14-month-old daughter.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Chief Constable has said he does not think police checkpoints are likely to be needed on the Irish border after Brexit.

actions.text: Nottingham Forest have confirmed that striker Nicklas Bendtner has left the club.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Wales' Catrin Nilsmark and England's Holly Clyburn are tied for second place after the second round of the Women's British Open.

actions.text: A man has been jailed for eight years for sexually abusing a teenage boy.

actions.text: Southampton manager Ronald Koeman has ruled himself out of the running to succeed Guus Hiddink as the Netherlands coach.
